title: Generation Jihad | Day 12 of the Iran War
description:

title: Why did the US military bomb the strategic Iranian island of Kharg?
description: President Donald Trump said US forces “obliterated” military targets on Iran’s Kharg Island. The piece of land is the beating heart of Iran’s oil export system, strategically located in the Persian Gulf. For decades, it has been essential in connecting Iran’s vast oil reserves with the global market. Donald Trump threatened to attack its oil infrastructure if Teheran continues attacking ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Why did the US bomb Kharg Island? What is its significance for Iran?

title: Middle East war live: US hits more than 90 targets on Kharg Island, Iran vows to retaliate
description: US forces struck more than 90 Iranian military targets in a major attack on Kharg Island, a vital oil hub, while "preserving the oil infrastructure", US Central Command said on Saturday as the war entered its third week. Iran said there were no casualties and has threatened to target US-linked oil infrastructure. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.

It's the third such incident since the war began. Turkey's president Erdogan says his priority is to keep his country out of the war in the Middle East. Details by Morgan Ayre.

description: The price settled at more than $103 a barrel, an increase of over 40 percent since the start of the war on Feb. 28. U.S. officials said another 2,500 Marines and as many as three more warships were heading to the Middle East.

title: США вывели финского бизнесмена с российским гражданством из-под санкций
description: Управление по контролю за иностранными активами Министерства финансов США (OFAC) исключило из санкционного списка гражданина Финляндии и России Никиту Ковалевского, известного также под фамилией Муравьев. Господин Ковалевский, проживающий в Вантаа, был исключен из перечня вместе со связанными с ним фирмами — GCH Finland Oy, Unicum Trade Oy и Acex Oy.

title: Iranian cluster bombs cause damage but no injuries at multiple sites in central Israel
description:
Impacts cause fires in Shoham and Holon, hit empty school in Rishon Lezion; IDF: 4-5,000 Iranian soldiers and commanders killed during war, senior intelligence officials targeted overnight
The post Iranian cluster bombs cause damage but no injuries at multiple sites in central Israel appeared first on The Times of Israel.
